name: 梦镜—乌托邦Dream MirrorUtopia
short_description: "Dreamland - Utopia" is a flat 2D Roguelike shot clear screen game, players will play different roles in the game, at the same time up to use six weapons, to fight off monsters in the dream world!
detailed_description:
The people of the real world have come to the dream, and the dream mirror is a strange new world, where there are all kinds of monsters, and if you are not careful, you will be trapped here forever, and we have to stay awake, and we have to keep fighting until we wake up from the dream.

Game Features:

• Players can play different roles in the game and challenge different ways of fighting.

• Multiple items and weapons are created to create different effects for players to explore on their own.

• Cute style

• Barrage shooting, fast-paced.

• Be able to customize the difficulty and gameplay, and find the most suitable way to survive in the dream world!

现实世界的人们来到了梦中，梦镜是一个奇怪的新世界，这里有着各种各样的怪物，稍不留神就会被永远困在这里，得保持清醒，从梦境中醒来之前，我们得一直战斗下去。

游戏特色：

•玩家可在游戏中扮演不同的角色，挑战不同的战斗方式。

•多种道具与武器会组成不同的效果，以供玩家自行探索搭配。

•风格可爱

•弹幕类射击，节奏迅速。

•能够自定义难度与玩法，在梦中世界找到最适合自己的生存方式！

supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
